title: Subject doctor payload
description: Emitted by `<subject> doctor --json`. The subject's self-check plus its contract pin: `contract_version` declares which contract version this subject implements — the field `learn subject doctor` reads before validating any other payload. A subject that drifts fails its own CI, not learn-cli's runtime. Exit code follows health: 0 healthy, 2 unhealthy.

contract_version.description: The subject-plugin contract version this subject pins and satisfies.

healthy.description: False when any severity=error check failed.
